summary: Lewis Hamilton's arrival at Ferrari injects fresh momentum into the Prancing Horse's championship hunt after weeks of wavering confidence, with his Spain victory proving the team can execute under pressure. McLaren's papaya squad hunts points in the midfield melee, where Mercedes' upgrades and Alpine's resurgence create a tactical minefield for pit-wall strategists. A dominant Ferrari-Mercedes display would signal Hamilton's integration is already yielding dividends, potentially reshaping the constructors' battle with six races remaining.
